title: Deny Network Communications Traffic by Default
description: Deny network communications traffic by default and allow network communications traffic by exception (i.e., deny all, permit by exception).

checks.name: Default Inbound Action is Block on All Profiles
checks.purpose: Verify Windows Defender Firewall DefaultInboundAction is Block on Domain, Private, and Public profiles to enforce deny-by-default for inbound traffic

checks.name: Explicit Outbound Allow Rules Exist
checks.purpose: Confirm explicit outbound Allow rules are defined rather than relying on a default allow-all posture, supporting permit-by-exception for outbound traffic

checks.name: Default Inbound Action is Block on All Profiles
checks.purpose: Verify Windows Defender Firewall default inbound action is Block on all profiles on the server

checks.name: Explicit Outbound Allow Rules Exist
checks.purpose: Confirm explicit outbound Allow rules are defined on the server to support permit-by-exception posture

checks.name: Deny-by-Default Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify a network policy documents deny-all/permit-by-exception as the default communications stance — policy review only

checks.name: iptables Default Policy is DROP/REJECT on All Chains
checks.purpose: Verify iptables INPUT, OUTPUT, and FORWARD chain default policies are DROP or REJECT to enforce deny-by-default for all traffic directions

checks.name: UFW or firewalld Default Deny Incoming
checks.purpose: Confirm ufw default incoming policy is deny or firewalld default zone is drop/block to enforce deny-by-default at the host boundary

checks.name: iptables Default Policy is DROP/REJECT on All Chains
checks.purpose: Verify iptables INPUT, OUTPUT, and FORWARD chain default policies are DROP or REJECT to enforce deny-by-default for all traffic directions

checks.name: UFW or firewalld Default Deny Incoming
checks.purpose: Confirm ufw default incoming policy is deny or firewalld default zone is drop/block to enforce deny-by-default at the host boundary

remediation: Configure Windows Defender Firewall DefaultInboundAction to Block for all profiles via GPO. Define explicit outbound Allow rules for required services. On Linux, set iptables/nftables default policies to DROP for INPUT, OUTPUT, and FORWARD chains, or configure ufw default deny incoming/outgoing.
